title: Home Row: F and J
description: Place your index fingers on F and J. Feel the bumps!
lines: f j f j f j f j
j f j f j f j f
f f j j f f j j
j j f f j j f f

title: Home Row: D and K
description: Add your middle fingers on D and K.
lines: d k d k d k d k
f d k j f d k j
dk jf dk jf dk jf
fd kj fd kj fd kj

title: Home Row: S and L
description: Add your ring fingers on S and L.
lines: s l s l s l s l
s d f j k l s l
sl dk fj sl dk fj

title: Home Row: A and ;
description: Add your pinky fingers on A and semicolon.
lines: a s d f j k l ;
; l k j f d s a

title: Home Row Mastery
description: Practice all home row keys together.
lines: a sad lad asks a lass

title: Top Row: E and I
description: Reach up from D and K to type E and I.
lines: e i e i e i e i
de ki de ki de ki

title: Top Row: R and U
description: Reach up from F and J to type R and U.
lines: r u r u r u r u
fr ju fr ju fr ju

title: Top Row: W and O
description: Reach up from S and L to type W and O.
lines: w o w o w o w o
sw lo sw lo sw lo

title: Top Row: Q and P
description: Reach up from A and ; to type Q and P.
lines: q p q p q p q p

title: Top Row Words
description: Practice real words using top and home rows.

title: Bottom Row: V and M
description: Reach down from F and J to type V and M.
lines: v m v m v m v m
fv jm fv jm fv jm

title: Bottom Row: C and Comma
description: Reach down from D and K to type C and comma.
lines: dc k, dc k, dc k,

title: Bottom Row: X and Period
description: Reach down from S and L for X and period.
lines: sx l. sx l. sx l.

title: Bottom Row: Z and Slash
description: Reach down from A and ; for Z and slash.

title: T and Y - Index Reach
description: Reach up-center from F and J for T and Y.
lines: t y t y t y t y
ft jy ft jy ft jy

title: G and H - Index Center
description: Reach inward from F and J for G and H.
lines: g h g h g h g h
fg jh fg jh fg jh

title: B and N - Index Reach Down
description: Reach down-center from F and J for B and N.
lines: b n b n b n b n
fb jn fb jn fb jn

title: Full Alphabet
description: You know all the letters! Practice common words.

title: Common Words
description: Type the most common English words.
lines: the of and to in is
you that it he was for
on are as with his they
at be this from or one

title: Numbers Row: 1-5
description: Reach up from the top row for numbers 1 through 5.

title: Numbers Row: 6-0
description: Reach up from the top row for numbers 6 through 0.

title: Sentences
description: Type complete sentences with proper spacing.
